docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-23-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY SERVILLON, ERNESTO AS TO DEFENDANT ENORME, SUSAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SERVILLON, ERNESTO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ENORME, SUSAN THE COURT DETERMUNES THAT PLAINTIFF WAS NOT A PARTY TO, OR INTENDED BENEFICIARY OF THE AGREEMENT BETWEEN DEFENDANT AND THE PROPERTY OWNER. HOWEVER, THE JUDGMENT IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY BENEFITS AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF AN THE EVENT OF A NO-FAULT EVICTION OR OTHER PROCEEDING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERVILLON, ERNESTO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$10.00) SERVED AUG-12-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ENORME, SUSAN
